task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Electrical Calculations' app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the lighting/lumens calculation section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app is on a screen for converting or calculating Luminous Flux (Lumens) from Luminous Intensity (Candela) and Beam Angle.

task_completion.description: Enter the required intensity and beam angle values
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '12000' is entered in the Candela/Intensity field, and '40' is entered in the Degrees/Beam Angle field.
The app displays the calculated Lumens result, which should be approximately 4547 or 4548.

task_completion.description: Save the result to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor shows the file '/sdcard/spotlight_results.txt' being created or viewed, containing the text 'Lumens: <value>' where the value is around 4548.

integrity.description: The agent used the specified Electrical Calculations app rather than a browser or generic calculator
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the distinct UI of the Electrical Calculations app being used for the math, not Google search, a Python script, or the default OS calculator.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the calculation in the app instead of hardcoding the expected answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculated result (approx 4548) is visibly generated on the app's screen before being written to the file.

integrity.description: The agent created the output file using standard tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is created using a visible text editor app or standard terminal commands (e.g., echo), rather than executing a pre-existing cheat script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected lumens value for 12,000 Candela and a 40-degree beam angle is approximately 4547.07. A 5% tolerance is allowed, meaning any value between ~4320 and ~4775 is acceptable. The output must be saved exactly to '/sdcard/spotlight_results.txt' in the format 'Lumens: <value>'. The correct app to use is 'Electrical Calculations' (package: com.hsn.electricalcalculations).
